snippet.title: 🔴 LIVE | MPL ID S17 | Playoffs Grand Finals | English
snippet.description:
👑 THE BATTLE FOR THE KINGFINIX THRONE HAS FINALLY ARRIVED!

After an unforgettable Regular Season and Playoffs filled with surprises, the journey of MPL ID Season 17 comes down to one final match. Only two teams remain, ready to fight for the ultimate prize and the MPL ID S17 Championship.

🔥 ONIC vs Bigetron Esports 🔥

On one side stands ONIC, a team determined to continue its legacy and further cement its status as one of the greatest dynasties in MPL Indonesia history.

On the other side stands Bigetron Esports, carrying the ambition to end ONIC's reign and prove that a new king is ready to rise.

Will ONIC continue their dominance and add another championship to their legacy?

Or will Bigetron Esports break the dynasty and usher in a new era of MPL Indonesia?

Witness the Grand Finals of MPL ID Season 17 and discover who will claim the KINGFINIX Throne!

snippet.title: James Arthur - Can I Be Him (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
james arthur - can i be him

thank you for spending a moment here with us. 
we hope the music brought you a little comfort.

feel free to subscribe if you felt the warmth of the music 🌟

· follow James Arthur:
spotify: https://open.spotify.com/artist/4IWBUUAFIplrNtaOHcJPRM?si=X7QmRhnTQFOVDKM-ElF5Dw
apple music: https://music.apple.com/us/artist/james-arthur/193502798

lyrics:
[verse 1]
you walked into the room
and now my heart's been stolen
you took me back in time to when i was unbroken
now you're all i want
and i knew it from the very first moment
'cause a light came on when i heard that song
and i want you to sing it again

[chorus]
i swear that every word you sing
you wrote them for me
like it was a private show
but i know you never saw me
when the lights come on and i'm on my own
will you be there to sing it again?
could i be the one you talk about in all your stories?
can i be him?

[verse 2]
i heard there was someone but i know he don't deserve you
if you were mine i'd never let anyone hurt you
i wanna dry those tears, kiss those lips
it's all that i've been thinking about
'cause a light came on when i heard that song
and i want you to sing it again

[chorus]
i swear that every word you sing
you wrote them for me
like it was a private show
but i know you never saw me
when the lights come on and i'm on my own
will you be there to sing it again?
could i be the one you talk about in all your stories?

[bridge]
can i be the one?
can i be the one?
can i be the one?
oh, can i, can i be him?

[refrain]
won't you sing it again
oh, when you sing it again
can i be him
won't you sing it again
oh, when you sing it again
can i be him?

[chorus]
i swear that every word you sang
you wrote them for me
like it was a private show
but i know you never saw me
when the lights come on and i'm on my own
will you be there, will you be there
can i be the one you talk about in all your stories
can i be him
can i be him
can i be him
can i be him

#jamesarthur #canibehim

“Palagi” is an original emotional hugot rap song about choosing someone every day, even through distance, pain, misunderstandings, and life’s struggles.

This song is for the person who became your peace in a noisy world. The one you still think about when you are tired, lost, or far away. The one you would still choose, again and again.

If you have someone who feels like home, this song is for you.

snippet.title: Star Song - Rob Deniel (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
#StarSong #RobDeniel #MyHusbandisaMafiaBoss #VicorMusic
Rob Deniel drops an official music video of “Star Song,” the official soundtrack of the Viva One series My Husband is a Mafia Boss, starring Joseph Marco as Ezekiel “Zeke” Roswell and Rhen Escaño as Aemie Romero.

Relying on the cosmic divine for signs, Rob Deniel’s newest single “Star Song” captures the very moment a person realizes they have finally found “the one.” Perfectly describing a fatalist kind of attraction, the singer-songwriter remains a musician willing to go to great lengths in the name of romance.

#StarSong #RobDeniel #MyHusbandisaMafiaBoss #VicorMusic
Rob Deniel drops an official music video of “Star Song,” the official soundtrack of the Viva One series My Husband is a Mafia Boss, starring Joseph Marco as Ezekiel “Zeke” Roswell and Rhen Escaño as Aemie Romero.
